title: ligularia cacaliiformis
intro: Ligularia cacaliiformis, also known as golden ray, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as possessing anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Ligularia cacaliiformis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
